## Art pack contribution

Thank you for contributing to the Digital Frames **Gallery** catalog.

### Checklist

- [ ] Pack contains **images + manifest fields only** (no Python, no scripts, no `type: widget`)
- [ ] Every image is **public domain** or otherwise free for redistribution (document source)
- [ ] `license` field on the pack states the terms clearly
- [ ] Images are reasonably sized (long edge ‚Č§ ~2400px recommended)
- [ ] `categories` tags set (e.g. `famous_artists`, `seasons`, `nature`)
- [ ] Ran `python3 scripts/stamp_catalog.py` so `version` / `sha256` are present
- [ ] I have read `docs/CATALOG_SCHEMA.md`
